violations.text: Working containers of dried ingredients in back storage room were observed not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

Exterior wall in back storeroom was observed to not be tight fitting. Large gap was observed between the wall studs and the exterior wall. Wall shall be repaired so that it flush with exterior wall and creates a tight seal. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets on True 1 door reach in in back storage room were observed in poor repair. Gasket shall be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the flooring behind and equipment on cook line was observed to have an accumulation of unidentifiable debris. Area shall be cleaned and cleaned on a frequent basis. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
